task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the ArkCase application interface, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to view the complaint cases in ArkCase
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase interface displaying a list or table of cases with columns such as Status, Priority, and Assignee.

task_completion.description: Agent created the case audit report file at the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/case_audit_report.txt' being edited or viewed.

task_completion.description: Report contains the correct header and case counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the report includes 'Generated by: arkcase-admin', 'Total Cases: 6', 'Active Cases: 4', and 'Closed Cases: 2'.

task_completion.description: Report correctly identifies high priority active cases
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text under 'HIGH PRIORITY ACTIVE CASES:' lists the 'Noise Complaint' and 'Improper Waste Disposal' cases.

task_completion.description: Report contains a pipe-delimited table of all cases
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text under 'ALL CASES:' contains a pipe-delimited table listing all 6 cases with their Status, Priority, and Assignee.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface to gather data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the ArkCase application, demonstrating genuine interaction rather than using backend API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent manually created or compiled the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using a text editor or standard terminal commands to write the file, rather than executing a pre-existing hidden script.

integrity.description: Agent only included the actual cases present in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: The cases listed in the report match the ones visible in the ArkCase GUI and do not include extra, hallucinated cases.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be saved at '/home/ga/case_audit_report.txt'. The required user is 'arkcase-admin'. There are exactly 6 cases: 4 Active (2 High-priority: 'Noise Complaint', 'Improper Waste Disposal'; 1 Medium-priority: 'Sidewalk Obstruction'; 1 Low-priority: 'Unauthorized Construction') and 2 Closed ('Delayed Permit', 'Street Light Outage').
